overall.description: A bus simulator game showing first-person perspective from the driver's cabin during a heavy rainstorm. The bus navigates through an industrial depot filled with parked yellow buses, exits onto urban streets, and merges onto a busy multi-lane highway while following a yellow freight truck. The footage features realistic rain effects on the windshield and detailed vehicle dashboard instrumentation.

scene_state.functional_zone: bus depot parking yard with multiple bays

agents.ego_description: navigating slowly forward through the depot between rows of parked yellow buses

notable_agents.action: yellow bus parked in the left row facing perpendicular to the path
yellow bus parked in the right row parallel to the driving direction

entered.detail: large industrial depot structure with multiple garage bays and yellow trim
tall lighting pole with multiple floodlights illuminating the depot yard
covered shelter structure extending over part of the parking area

segments.scene_description: The bus begins moving through a wide industrial bus depot during heavy rainfall. Rows of parked yellow buses line both sides of the asphalt yard, while a large depot building stands in the background. The windshield wipers operate continuously as the vehicle navigates slowly between the parked buses.

scene_state.functional_zone: depot exit lane with security perimeter

events.description: bus passes through the depot security gate and exits onto public roads

agents.ego_description: making a right turn to exit the depot, accelerating slightly as leaving the facility

notable_agents.action: pink sedan parked near the exit gate partially visible through the fence

entered.detail: metal security fence with barbed wire topping running along the depot perimeter
depot exit gate with horizontal barrier arm and security booth
tall street lighting pole outside the depot entrance

segments.scene_description: The bus navigates through the narrower exit lanes of the depot, passing chain-link security fencing on the right. The vehicle makes a right turn through the exit gate, transitioning from the industrial depot interior to the external road network. A pink sedan is parked near the exit, visible through the fence.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban access road merging onto highway

events.description: bus merges onto the multi-lane highway with moderate traffic flow
accelerating to highway speed while joining the main traffic stream

agents.ego_description: merging onto the busy highway, navigating between other vehicles in heavy rain conditions

notable_agents.action: white sedan driving parallel in the left lane with headlights on
silver car entering the highway from the right merge lane

entered.detail: modern glass and concrete commercial building with ground floor parking
metal highway guardrail running along the left edge of the road
large overhead gantry structure supporting highway direction signs

segments.scene_description: The bus drives along the urban access road, passing modern commercial buildings on the right. The vehicle approaches and merges onto the main highway, accelerating to match the speed of surrounding traffic. Highway infrastructure including guardrails and overhead sign gantries become visible as the bus joins the multi-lane road.

scene_state.functional_zone: multi-lane highway with dense traffic in heavy rain

events.description: bus slows and stops behind a yellow TML truck at a red traffic light
traffic light changes to green and vehicles begin accelerating forward

agents.ego_description: following a yellow freight truck closely on the highway, stopping at the red light then proceeding when it changes

notable_agents.action: yellow TML truck directly ahead with brake lights illuminated, stopped at traffic light
white sedan in the left lane moving parallel and slightly ahead of the bus

entered.detail: overhead traffic signal showing red then changing to green
large roadside advertising billboard visible through the rain
concrete overpass bridge crossing the highway ahead

segments.scene_description: The bus travels on the open highway in heavy rainfall, following a yellow TML truck. The vehicle approaches a traffic light, stops behind the truck when the light turns red, then proceeds when it changes to green. Multiple vehicles are visible in adjacent lanes, with their headlights reflecting off the wet road surface.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective from a bus cabin as it transitions from a secluded industrial depot into the flow of a rainy urban highway. It begins by navigating slowly through a wide asphalt yard lined with rows of parked yellow buses, with windshield wipers working constantly against heavy rainfall. As the vehicle moves toward the perimeter, the scene narrows into exit lanes passing chain-link fencing and a parked pink sedan before turning right through the gate. The environment then shifts to an urban access road flanked by modern commercial buildings, gradually expanding as the bus accelerates to merge onto a multi-lane highway beneath overhead sign gantries. Finally, the camera follows a yellow TML truck through the rain, coming to a brief halt at a red light where headlights reflect off the wet pavement before proceeding forward into the traffic.
